Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-18 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Dashboard LINC ranks #1 with an exceptional score of 95.9, driven by extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—10-year returns of 1,320% vastly outpace SPY's performance by 1,085 percentage points. The stock displays textbook strong momentum with all four moving average conditions met, a "clean" momentum signal, and confirmed volatility, supported by 4 of 5 ratio passes showing consistent acceleration. FTI ranks #2 with similarly strong 5-year returns (643.68%) and a rare 5.45x ratio jump from 1-month to 3-month returns, but shows a notable red flag: its 10-year return of 219.54% trails SPY by 14.9 percentage points, suggesting this secular trend may have peaked. Both leaders demonstrate sectoral strength with highest correlations to materials (XLB) and industrials (XLI), indicating the momentum driver is concentrated in cyclical value sectors rather than broad-based gains.
